name: edgekit
description: Browser-native agent runtime for adding AI sidecars to web apps.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-ui build && pnpm --filter @kevinmarmstrong/edgekit-cli build && pnpm --filter @edgekit/ecommerce-demo build && pnpm --filter @edgekit/site build
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @edgekit/ecommerce-demo build && pnpm --filter @edgekit/site build && EDGEKIT_E2E_FRESH=1 playwright test
scripts.test:workflows: pnpm --filter @edgekit/ecommerce-demo build && pnpm --filter @edgekit/site build && EDGEKIT_E2E_FRESH=1 playwright test tests/e2e/ecommerce.spec.ts tests/e2e/admin.spec.ts
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm build && pnpm --dir site dlx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name edgekit
